## tscli set service approval

Set service approval state for a device

```
tscli set service approval [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --approved         Whether the service is approved for this device
      --device string    Device ID
  -h, --help             help for approval
      --service string   Service name
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
